name: Noka Resources Inc.
description: Noka Resources Inc. is a junior exploration company based in Canada, formerly listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol NX. The company focused on the identification, evaluation, and acquisition of mineral properties, with a portfolio that included lithium projects in Nevada, as well as uranium and gold exploration assets in Canada. Following its period of active mineral exploration, the company underwent corporate changes, including a name change to Pacton Gold Inc., shifting its strategic focus toward gold projects in Ontario and Western Australia.
